name: oap-email
description: Ask about your email or manage your inbox in natural language. Questions: 'anything urgent today?', 'emails from Amy', 'what came in overnight?', 'anything about the invoice?', 'what needs my attention?'. Manager: 'always archive emails from @medium.com', 'never archive emails from @cpa.com', 'show what the email manager did today', 'show pending drafts'. Sender preferences: 'always treat @facebook.com as noise', 'mark joe@cpa.us as important'.

input.description: Use action='ask' for any natural language question. Use 'manage' to run autonomous inbox management. Use 'preferences_add' to teach a rule, 'preferences_list' to see rules, 'manager_log' to see what was done.

action.description: ask (questions), manage (run autonomous management), preferences_add, preferences_list, preferences_remove, manager_log, relationships_list, drafts_list, drafts_approve, drafts_reject, drafts_send

question.description: For ask action — your natural language question about email.

manager_action.description: For preferences_add — what to do: archive, unsubscribe, ignore, flag, draft_reply

output.description: For ask: messages with sender, subject, priority, snippet. For manage: summary of actions taken. For preferences/log/drafts: respective lists.
